title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 3-E.  LOUISIANA ROAD HOME

HOUSING CORPORATION ACT

§600.61.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Road Home Housing Corporation Act".

Acts 2006, No. 654, §1, eff. June 29, 2006.
